message: No documentation action needed: PR #58459 (commit 2bbd73b) removes redundant Azure.Identity PackageReference entries from 6 build project files. This is a purely internal dependency hygiene change — no public APIs, types, or methods were added or changed. README and sample documentation for affected packages (Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses, Azure.Extensions.AspNetCore.Configuration.Secrets, WebPubSubForSocketIO, voicelive samples) require no updates.
